mapper.select: SELECT l.lot_id, l.project_id, p.project_name, l.lot_code, l.lot_name, l.lot_no, l.lot_scope, l.status, l.budget_amount, l.bid_start_time, l.bid_end_time, l.opening_time, l.evaluation_mode, l.award_mode, l.remark, l.version, l.create_time, l.update_time FROM t_bid_lot l INNER JOIN t_bid_project p ON p.project_id = l.project_id WHERE l.lot_id = #{lotId} AND l.deleted_flag = 0 AND p.deleted_flag = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT l.lot_id, l.project_id, p.project_name, l.lot_code, l.lot_name, l.lot_no, l.lot_scope, l.status, l.budget_amount, l.bid_start_time, l.bid_end_time, l.opening_time, l.evaluation_mode, l.award_mode, l.remark, l.version, l.create_time, l.update_time FROM t_bid_lot l INNER JOIN t_bid_project p ON p.project_id = l.project_id WHERE l.project_id = #{projectId} AND l.deleted_flag = 0 AND p.deleted_flag = 0 ORDER BY l.lot_no ASC, l.lot_id DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_bid_lot
project_id = #{projectId}, lot_code = #{lotCode}, lot_name = #{lotName}, lot_no = #{lotNo}, lot_scope = #{lotScope}, status = #{status}, budget_amount = #{budgetAmount}, bid_start_time = #{bidStartTime}, bid_end_time = #{bidEndTime}, opening_time = #{openingTime}, evaluation_mode = #{evaluationMode}, award_mode = #{awardMode}, remark = #{remark}, update_user_id = #{updateUserId}, version = version + 1
WHERE lot_id = #{lotId} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_flag = 0
UPDATE t_bid_lot SET status = #{toStatus}, update_user_id = #{updateUserId}, update_time = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted_flag = 0 AND status = #{fromStatus}
